queueContract.purpose: Freeze M28+ implementation units from M26 review rows.
queueContract.rowCoverageRule: Every M26 implementationReviewRows entry must appear in exactly one queue unit.
queueContract.ownerRule: No queue unit may have M27 as implementation owner after this milestone.
gapIntakeProcedure: Add the newly discovered original source row to feature/definition/save/session coverage first.
Add sourceEvidenceId and primary source path before implementation.
Regenerate M26 audit and M27 queue before closing the owning implementation milestone.

requiredEvidenceTemplate.sourceEvidence: Every referenced row keeps primary source evidence or is converted into approved exclusion with user approval.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.featureRuntime: No feature rows in this unit.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.definitionConsumption: Definition rows require runtime consumption through feature/view/calculation/save-init, or a blocker/approved exclusion.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.saveRoundtrip: Save roundtrip required only if this unit mutates save state.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.sessionLifecycle: Session/calculation rows require create, consume, dispose checks and must not enter save payloads.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.viewEvidence: If user-visible state is involved, the owner milestone must add view evidence or an explicit not-visible reason.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.pathCoverage: Success path is required. Failure/cancel/roundtrip are required when the row kind or feature flow can produce them.

queueUnits.closureRule: All rowRefs in this unit must become implemented/used/mapped-consumed, remain blocker-owned by this unit, or receive explicit approved exclusion before the owner milestone can close.
